subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come is verily the Lamp of Guidance amidst all created things and the Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه مصباح الهدایه بین البریه و الایه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
